title: Alternative Beliefs
questions: Do you think there is intelligent life on other planets?
Some people claim to have seen UFOs (Unidentified Flying Objects) such as flying saucers. Do you believe them?
What is your opinion of people who say that they can communicate with spirits? Have you ever taken part in a seance?
Do you know anybody with psychic powers or extra sensory perception?
Do you believe in telepathy? Is there another person in the world with whom you have a special understanding?
Would you ever visit an astrologer for a forecast of how your life will run in the future?
What does your star sign tell you about your personality and your compatibility with other people?
Do you believe in other forms of fortune-telling such as palmistry? tarot cards? reading teacups?
